column1: Query SQL: SELECT url_id , COUNT(*) as COUNT_legal FROM hotels_legal GROUP BY url_id ORDER BY url_id limit 200
Query SQL: SELECT url_id , COUNT(*) as COUNT_polices FROM hotels_policies GROUP BY url_id ORDER BY url_id limit 200
Query SQL: SELECT url_id , language, COUNT(*) as COUNT_policies FROM hotels_policies GROUP BY url_id, language ORDER BY url_id, language limit 200
Query SQL: SELECT url_id , COUNT(*) as COUNT_descriptions FROM hotels_description GROUP BY url_id  ORDER BY url_id limit 200
Query SQL: SELECT url_id , language, COUNT(*) AS COUNT_service_category  FROM hotels_all_services WHERE language ='en' GROUP BY url_id , language limit 200

Query SQL: SELECT al.url_id , al.hotel_id , al.language , COUNT(al.*) AS COUNT_service_category , h.hotel_name FROM hotels_all_services al LEFT JOIN hotels h ON al.url_id = h.url_id and al.language = h.language and al.hotel_id = h.id GROUP BY al.url_id , al.hotel_id , h.hotel_name , al.language ORDER BY  al.url_id , al.language  limit 200

column1: Query SQL: SELECT * FROM url_language_status WHERE status <> 'done' ORDER BY url_id , language limit 200

Query SQL: SELECT uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error, COUNT(DISTINCT h.language)  AS hotels_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hd.language) AS desc_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.language) AS policies_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) AS legal_langs FROM url_queue uq LEFT JOIN hotels h ON uq.id = h.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_description hd ON uq.id = hd.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_policies hp    ON uq.id = hp.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_legal hl ON uq.id = hl.url_id GROUP BY uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) < 6 OR COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) < COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) ASC limit 200
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count, MIN(updated_at) AS oldest, MAX(updated_at) AS newest FROM url_queue GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
-- Diagnóstico integral de todas las URLs afectadas
uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error,
COUNT(DISTINCT h.language)  AS hotels_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hd.language) AS desc_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.language) AS policies_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) AS legal_langs
LEFT JOIN hotels h          ON uq.id = h.url_id
LEFT JOIN hotels_description hd ON uq.id = hd.url_id
LEFT JOIN hotels_policies hp    ON uq.id = hp.url_id
LEFT JOIN hotels_legal hl       ON uq.id = hl.url_id
GROUP BY uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) < 6 OR COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) < COUNT(DISTINCT h.language)
-- Run after each batch to confirm all 6 languages are captured.
LEFT JOIN hotels h ON h.url_id = uq.id
GROUP BY uq.id, uq.url, uq.status, uq.languages_failed
ORDER BY missing_count DESC, uq.updated_at DESC
